# `.github`

## Purpose

GitHub repository automation, workflows, and community health files.

## Ownership

CI/CD Platform Engineering and Governance.

## Architectural Boundary

Repository automation boundary.

## Future Responsibilities

Future workflow and template evolution through reviewed PRs.

## Forbidden Responsibilities

No product logic, secrets, or bypasses of governance checks.

## Governance

Changes to this directory must preserve the Climate Systems Console Architecture Constitution, pass dependency-cruiser validation, satisfy TypeScript strictness, and be reviewed for boundary conformance before merge.
